prompts.name: Cotton
prompts.text: Use natural cotton fabric with soft texture, breathable structure, and subtle wrinkles.

prompts.name: Denim
prompts.text: Use denim material with visible weave, sturdy structure, and realistic seam detail.

prompts.name: Silk
prompts.text: Use silk fabric with smooth flow, gentle sheen, and elegant highlights.

prompts.name: Satin
prompts.text: Use satin material with glossy reflections, soft folds, and luxurious surface response.

prompts.name: Velvet
prompts.text: Use velvet material with rich softness, deep color absorption, and subtle directional texture.

prompts.name: Lace
prompts.text: Use delicate lace with intricate patterns, semi-transparent detail, and refined edges.

prompts.name: Leather
prompts.text: Use leather material with natural grain, subtle shine, and realistic thickness.

prompts.name: Wool
prompts.text: Use wool fabric with warm texture, soft fibers, and cozy seasonal character.

prompts.name: Polished Metal
prompts.text: Use polished metal with clean reflections, realistic highlights, and durable surface detail.

prompts.name: Brushed Metal
prompts.text: Use brushed metal with fine linear texture and muted reflective quality.

prompts.name: Gold
prompts.text: Use gold accents with warm metallic shine and ornate detail.

prompts.name: Silver
prompts.text: Use silver accents with cool metallic reflections and clean elegant finish.

prompts.name: Glass
prompts.text: Use transparent glass with believable refraction, highlights, and edge definition.

prompts.name: Crystal
prompts.text: Use crystal material with sharp facets, luminous reflections, and clear structure.

prompts.name: Wood
prompts.text: Use natural wood with visible grain, warm tones, and realistic surface variation.
